### Music. Lots of it.

With more than 60 bands each year Shaky Knees is a rock-lover’s dream. Since its inception in 2013, Shaky Knees has featured a diverse lineup ranging from world-renowned acts to up-and-coming artists.

![Shaky Knees festival sign with a crowd surfer in the background](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/66fe48fc2c1be11475c025f0/6942dcc1c8a034d0f860aada_SK26-website_sign.png)

### Best Bites in Town.

From good ol’ southern BBQ to vegetarian friendly corn dogs, the food trucks at Shaky Knees have something for everyone. Enjoy a bite from one of your favorite Atlanta locals or try some new fare at trucks that hail from throughout the Southeast.

![Two people sitting on a field, enjoying a burger and ice cream](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/66fe48fc2c1be11475c025f0/6942dcb0bb9c7a353d44c2c3_SK26-website_food.png)

### More To Explore.

Shaky Knees takes place in the heart of downtown Atlanta, at Piedmont Park. Discover activations, pop-ups, connect with friends and more in the shade between the stages. Take in the scenery and views in the historic park.

![Aerial view of Piedmont Park during the Shaky Knees festival](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/66fe48fc2c1be11475c025f0/6942dcd227f636318dab1661_SK26-website_park.png)
